name: Galena Arts and Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Galena Arts and Recreation in Galena, IL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Galena Pickleball Complex
description: Galena Pickleball Complex is a place to play pickleball in Galena, IL. There are 8 outdoor acrylic and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Outdoor courts are general open March through November
hours: 8:00 a.m.-4:30 p.m. M-F Links Home Government Residents Links Businesses Visitors How Do I... Stay Connected © 2026 City of Galena. All rights reserved. name: Stockton CUSD 206
description: Come play pickleball at Stockton CUSD 206 in Stockton, IL! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private. You can’t reserve the court.
